media_block.fetch.error.string: Cannot fetch media. Verify the URL and fetch settings.
media_block.fetch.error.comment: Displayed when media (image, audio or video) fetching fails.

media_block.not_found.error.comment: Displayed when the server returns a 404 or non-200 status.

media_block.unknown.error.string: Cannot fetch media. Unknown error. File: {file}
media_block.unknown.error.comment: Generic fallback for network failures or unexpected exceptions.
